notes: Lapse review + adjustment factor (OBJ 1.2): verbatim five-case window comparison (initial_policy_days_adjustment), border-lapse forgiveness (lapse_start/lapse_end), and the verbatim final formulas (responsible_days = SUM(of lapse:, lapse_start, lapse_end); coverage_days; coverage_days_pct). Synthetic coverage_date_ranges_final of one consolidated window per account. Produces coverage_days_pct, the engine's headline % owed back.
